title: Add Author Section to README
description: Insert an 'Author' section into the project's README file to credit the main contributor(s).
details: Open the README.md file in the project root. Add a clearly labeled 'Author' section near the end (or in a logical position if a convention exists), listing the author(s) by name and, optionally, contact information or GitHub profile links. Ensure formatting is consistent with the rest of the README and adheres to Markdown best practices.
test_strategy: Review the updated README.md file. Confirm that the 'Author' section appears as intended, is free of typos, and matches project formatting. Optionally, preview the file in a Markdown viewer to verify correct rendering.
